title: furcaria surattensis
intro: Furcaria surattensis, also known as the Indian furcaria, is a type of algae that belongs to the family Derbesiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Furcaria surattensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Furcaria surattensis is typically prepared as a herbal extract or tea, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
